recipes.title: Easy Italian Bean Salad
recipes.excerpt: A quick and easy summery salad that comes together in minutes. Two kinds of beans are folded through juicy cherry tomatoes, thinly sliced red onion, and plenty of parsley, then dressed simply with good olive oil, lemon, and garlic.
recipes.description: A quick and easy summery salad that comes together in minutes. Two kinds of beans are folded through juicy cherry tomatoes, thinly sliced red onion, and plenty of parsley, then dressed simply with good olive oil, lemon, and garlic.

steps.title: Chop
steps.description: Finely chop the spring onions and put into a bowl with the garlic and the chilli.

steps.title: Combine
steps.description: Tip both cans of drained beans into a large bowl with the cherry tomatoes, red onion, and parsley.

steps.title: Dress
steps.description: Whisk the olive oil, white wine vinegar, lemon juice, and grated garlic together, then pour over the salad. Add plenty of seasoning. Stir through the salad with plenty of chopped parsley.

steps.title: Rest
steps.description: Toss gently to coat, season to taste, and rest for 10 minutes so the flavours meld before serving.

recipes.title: Lemon Herb Roasted Chicken
recipes.excerpt: A comforting classic elevated with bright citrus and fragrant rosemary. Roasted low and slow until the skin turns golden and crisp, this is the kind of meal that fills the whole home with warmth.
recipes.description: A comforting classic elevated with bright citrus and fragrant rosemary. Roasted low and slow until the skin turns golden and crisp, this is the kind of meal that fills the whole home with warmth.

steps.title: Prepare the Bird
steps.description: Pat the chicken completely dry and bring it to room temperature. Rub all over with olive oil, then season generously inside and out.

steps.title: Aromatics
steps.description: Tuck the halved lemons, garlic, and rosemary into the cavity. Truss the legs to help the bird cook evenly.

steps.title: Roast
steps.description: Roast at 200°C for 75–90 minutes, basting once, until the juices run clear and the skin is deeply golden.

steps.title: Rest and Serve
steps.description: Let the chicken rest for 15 minutes before carving so the juices settle. Serve with the pan drippings.

recipes.title: Classic Caprese Salad
recipes.excerpt: A timeless Italian classic that celebrates the simplicity of fresh ingredients. Creamy buffalo mozzarella, sun-ripened tomatoes, and fragrant basil are brought together with a drizzle of premium extra virgin olive oil and a pinch of sea salt.
recipes.description: A timeless Italian classic that celebrates the simplicity of fresh ingredients. Creamy buffalo mozzarella, sun-ripened tomatoes, and fragrant basil are brought together with a drizzle of premium extra virgin olive oil and a pinch of sea salt.

steps.title: Prepare the Ingredients
steps.description: Wash and dry the tomatoes and basil. Slice the tomatoes and buffalo mozzarella into thick, even rounds.

steps.title: Layer the Salad
steps.description: On a large serving platter, alternate slices of tomato and mozzarella, tucking a fresh basil leaf between each layer.

steps.title: Season and Dress
steps.description: Drizzle the extra virgin olive oil generously over the arranged salad.

steps.title: Final Touch
steps.description: Sprinkle with a pinch of sea salt and a few grinds of black pepper. Serve immediately at room temperature for the best flavor.

recipes.title: Artisan Sourdough
recipes.excerpt: The meditative process of wild yeast fermentation, resulting in an open, tender crumb and a perfectly crackling, blistered crust. Patience is the key ingredient.
recipes.description: The meditative process of wild yeast fermentation, resulting in an open, tender crumb and a perfectly crackling, blistered crust. Patience is the key ingredient.

steps.title: Autolyse
steps.description: Mix the flour and water and rest for one hour to let the flour hydrate fully.

steps.title: Bulk Ferment
steps.description: Add the starter and salt. Perform a series of stretch-and-folds over 4–5 hours until the dough is airy.

steps.title: Shape and Proof
steps.description: Shape into a tight boule, then cold-proof in the fridge overnight for flavor.

steps.title: Score and Bake
steps.description: Score the chilled dough and bake in a preheated Dutch oven at 230°C until deeply golden.

recipes.title: Roasted Tomato & Basil Soup
recipes.excerpt: Roasting concentrates the tomatoes into something deep and sweet before they are blended smooth with garlic and a handful of fresh basil. Simple, nourishing, and endlessly comforting on a quiet afternoon.
recipes.description: Roasting concentrates the tomatoes into something deep and sweet before they are blended smooth with garlic and a handful of fresh basil. Simple, nourishing, and endlessly comforting on a quiet afternoon.

steps.title: Roast
steps.description: Toss the tomatoes, onion, and garlic with olive oil and roast at 200°C for 35 minutes until caramelised at the edges.

steps.title: Blend
steps.description: Tip the roasted vegetables into a pot with the stock and most of the basil, then blend until completely smooth.

steps.title: Warm Through
steps.description: Gently reheat, loosening with a little extra stock or water to your preferred consistency.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Season to taste and finish with the remaining torn basil and a swirl of olive oil.

recipes.title: Fettuccine Alfredo
recipes.excerpt: Ribbons of pasta in a glossy butter-and-parmesan sauce — rich and indulgent.
recipes.description: Just butter, parmesan, and pasta water emulsified into a luxuriously glossy sauce that coats every ribbon of fettuccine. Simple, rich, and best eaten immediately.

steps.title: Cook the Pasta
steps.description: Boil the fettuccine until al dente, saving plenty of pasta water.

steps.title: Emulsify
steps.description: Melt the butter with a splash of pasta water, then add the pasta and parmesan, tossing into a glossy sauce.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Loosen with more pasta water as needed and finish with black pepper.

recipes.title: Fluffy Pancakes
recipes.excerpt: Thick American-style pancakes that rise tall and stay fluffy. A quick batter, a hot pan, and a stack worth waking up for.
recipes.description: Thick American-style pancakes that rise tall and stay fluffy. A quick batter, a hot pan, and a stack worth waking up for.

steps.title: Mix
steps.description: Whisk the dry ingredients, then stir in the egg, milk, and melted butter to a thick batter.

steps.title: Cook
steps.description: Ladle into a hot, lightly buttered pan and cook until bubbles form, then flip.

steps.title: Stack
steps.description: Stack up and serve with butter and maple syrup.

recipes.title: Chocolate Brownies
recipes.excerpt: Fudgy, glossy-topped brownies with a deep, dark chocolate hit.
recipes.description: The brownie of dreams: a shiny, crackly top giving way to a dense, fudgy middle. Melt good dark chocolate into the batter and don't overbake.

steps.title: Melt
steps.description: Gently melt the chocolate and butter together, then cool slightly.

steps.title: Whisk
steps.description: Whisk the eggs and sugar until pale and thick, then fold in the chocolate and flour.

steps.title: Bake
steps.description: Bake at 180°C for about 25 minutes until set with a slight wobble; cool before cutting.

recipes.title: Thai Green Curry
recipes.excerpt: Aromatic green curry paste loosened with coconut milk and simmered with chicken and vegetables, finished with lime and Thai basil for a fresh, fiery bowl.
recipes.description: Aromatic green curry paste loosened with coconut milk and simmered with chicken and vegetables, finished with lime and Thai basil for a fresh, fiery bowl.

steps.title: Fry the Paste
steps.description: Fry the curry paste in a little coconut milk until fragrant and split.

steps.title: Simmer
steps.description: Add the chicken and remaining coconut milk and simmer until cooked through.

steps.title: Finish
steps.description: Stir through lime juice and Thai basil, and serve with rice.
